def positive_http_client_url_built_from_user_input_without_allowlist():
    rule_id = "http_client_url_built_from_user_input_without_allowlist"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "HTTP client URL constructed from user-controlled input without an allowlist or URL validation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
